items.visual_description: A midi-length black slip dress made of a shiny, satin-like material. It features a straight neckline with a delicate white or silver beaded trim. The dress has thin, double spaghetti straps. A high slit is visible on one side of the dress.

overall_description: A minimalist and elegant black satin slip dress, featuring delicate detailing like thin double spaghetti straps and a subtle trim along the neckline, complete with a side slit for a modern touch.
